headline: What Does JPMorgan Think About Accenture (ACN) After Slashing Its Price Target by $46?
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the best tech stocks to invest in on the dip. On June 8, JPMorgan analyst Tien Tsin Huang cut his price target on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) from $247 to $201, while holding on to an Overweight rating.
